text.title: HAProxy / Nginx Load Balancer Configuration Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end with decision gates.

step.name: decide-apply-vs-skip
step.action: Decision tree on managed vs self-hosted + HA presence.
step.decision-gate: If decision != apply, STOP and document `skip-this-methodology` rationale.

step.name: declare-globals-defaults
step.action: Author `global` and `defaults` blocks with explicit limits.

step.name: define-frontends
step.action: HTTP→HTTPS redirect + HTTPS frontend with ACLs.

step.name: define-backends
step.action: One backend per pool with appropriate balance + health checks.

step.name: rate-limit-validate
step.action: Add per-IP limit; run `haproxy -c`; run validator; commit.
step.decision-gate: If validator exits non-zero, return to the previous draft step and fix violations.
